summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening to pick up Chapter 9's announced naming bell on the following afternoon, and tightened the final beat so it hands off more directly into Chapter 11's shared sleeping quarters.
edits: Rewrote the opening sentence and paragraph scaffold to anchor the scene to Fasa ringing the naming bell the next afternoon while preserving Jin's cistern task and the original tone.
Kept the naming scene, confrontation, and Bram aftermath intact with no plot-level changes.
Adjusted the final line to send Jin back into the cloth-partitioned dark and communal breathing that lead into Chapter 11.
